肝膽胰癌多專科團隊會議
2026年6月4日(星期四)  07:30-08:30
聯絡人：暫無專職個管師
肝膽胰癌　召集人：張正雄醫師　核心成員：一般外科李岳聰醫師、林建華醫師；消化內科陳忠宏醫師、王俊偉醫師；影像診斷科張哲維醫師；病理科賴義雄醫師；核醫科侯柏年醫師；放射腫瘤科劉育昌醫師、林伯儒醫師
肝膽胰癌
2026年6月4日(星期四)
1701482 鄭○南 M/78 VS 林建華醫師肝膽胰癌
HCC, s/p laparoscopic S8 hepatectomy (2020-06-11), with S7/S8 marginal recurrence with diaphragmatic invasion, s/p laparoscopic lysis of adhesion + cholecystectomy converted to exploratory laparotomy with liver biopsy + diaphragm removal + RFA (2026-05-13)
現病史A 78-year-old male with chronic hepatitis C and prior HCC s/p laparoscopic S8 hepatectomy (2020-06-11) presented with mildly elevated AFP (8.4 ng/mL, 2026-01-27) during routine follow-up. CT (2026-05-01) confirmed a 5.4 cm recurrent HCC at S7/S8 surgical margins with extracapsular rupture and direct diaphragmatic invasion. He underwent laparoscopic lysis of adhesion, cholecystectomy, converted to exploratory laparotomy with liver biopsy, diaphragm removal, and RFA (2026-05-13). Discharged on 2026-05-30.
過去病史HTN(+) HCV(+) Thyroid carcinoma s/p thyroidectomy (1998-12-28), prostate adenocarcinoma (Gleason 4+4=8) s/p RT (2024), left thumb melanoma s/p amputation (>20 years ago), right knee TKR,
癌指數AFP： 2.5(2022-09-27)→2.5(2022-10-22)→2.6(2023-12-20)→2.1(2024-04-11)→1.9(2024-08-29)→1.8(2024-12-19)→2.2(2025-05-08)→2.5(2025-10-22)→3.9(2026-03-11)→3.7(2026-08-12)→8.4(2026-01-27)
PIVKA-II： 765
病理2026-05-14： Liver, intraoperative biopsy — hepatocellular carcinoma, Grade 2, trabecular pattern with fine fibrovascular stroma. IHC: CD34(+), HepPar-1(+), Arginase(+).
檢查CT(2026-05-01)
Liver S7/S8, 5.4 cm poorly enhancing mass at prior surgical margin with extracapsular rupture and direct invasion into right subphrenic space and right hemidiaphragm, consistent with recurrent HCC. Multiple small (<2.6 cm) non-enhancing low-density nodules in bilateral hepatic lobes, nature undetermined. Penetrating atherosclerotic ulcer in infrarenal abdominal aorta.
治療#Laparoscopic S8 hepatectomy(2020-06-11)
Initial HCC treatment: laparoscopic S8 hepatectomy.#RT (prostate adenocarcinoma)(2024-04-23)
Prior treatment for prostate adenocarcinoma: 7000 cGy/35 fractions (2024-04-23 to 2024-06-03).Laparoscopic lysis of adhesion + cholecystectomy + exploratory laparotomy with liver biopsy + diaphragm removal + RFA(2026-05-13)
Recurrence treatment: laparoscopic lysis of adhesion + cholecystectomy, converted to exploratory laparotomy with liver biopsy, diaphragm removal, and RFA.
討論討論後續治療策略。
影像討論分期討論治療策略討論
1/1
